questions.question: Which of the following is the main objective of the Right to Information Act?
questions.option_1: To prevent public access to government records
questions.option_2: To provide private data to media houses
questions.option_3: To ensure secrecy in public administration

questions.question: As of July 2025, how many Indian States have a bicameral legislature (i.e. both, a Legislative Assembly and a Legislative Council)?
Overseas Citizen of India (OCI) holders are:
questions.option_1: Dual citizens of India and another country
questions.option_2: Persons entitled to hold constitutional posts

questions.question: Which Amendment extended the reservation of seats for SCs and STs in the legislatures for another 10 years till 2030?
In Indian State governments, to whom is the State Council of Ministers collectively responsible?
questions.option_1: Chief Justice of the concerned State

questions.question: The Eleventh Schedule of the Indian Constitution relates to which of the following?
What key principle did the Supreme Court emphasise in the 2024 Property Owners Association v State of Maharashtra case?
questions.option_1: Only scarce or vital resources justify state takeover.
questions.option_2: Public trust doctrine applies to all private assets.
questions.option_3: State can acquire all private properties at will.
questions.option_4: Government power overrides individual property rights.

questions.question: According to Article 79 of the Indian Constitution, the Parliament of India consists of:
questions.option_1: President, Lok Sabha, and Rajya Sabha
questions.option_2: President, Vice President, and Prime Minister
questions.option_3: Prime Minister, Lok Sabha, and Rajya Sabha
questions.option_4: only Lok Sabha and Rajya Sabha

questions.question: Special provisions for certain states are covered under which Part of the Indian Constitution?
Which Article of the Constitution deals with the reservation of seats for Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes in the Lok Sabha?
What is the term period of the Comptroller and Auditor General (CAG) of India?
Which act gave statutory status to the Central Vigilance Commission (CVC)?
Which of the following central services holds the highest prestige, pay and emoluments among its peers?
The Tenth Schedule of the Indian Constitution is related to the:
questions.option_4: distribution of seats in the Lok Sabha

questions.question: What major change was made by the 86ᵗʰ Constitutional Amendment Act, 2002?
questions.option_3: Declared education as a Fundamental Right

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT an instrument of parliamentary control over the executive in India?
questions.option_2: No-confidence motion against the Council of Ministers
questions.option_3: Question Hour in the Lok Sabha
questions.option_4: Approval of government bills (laws) by the Parliament

questions.question: Which Article of the Indian Constitution was amended by the 106ᵗʰ Constitutional Amendment Act to provide for women’s reservation in the Legislative Assembly of Delhi?
Which Article of the Constitution provides special provisions for the State of Nagaland?
The President of India is also the Supreme Commander of which force in India?
Which of the following correctly describes a key function of Subordinate Courts in India?
questions.option_1: Resolve civil and criminal disputes at the district level

questions.question: Which Fundamental Right protects citizens from being forced into labour or human trafficking?
Which Article of the Constitution states, 'no person shall be deprived of his property save by authority of law'?
Under the Fifth Schedule, which primary authority is granted to the Governor of a State regarding Scheduled Areas?
questions.option_1: Power to regulate land, forests and social customs in Scheduled Areas
questions.option_2: Power to dissolve the State Legislative Assembly
questions.option_3: Authority to appoint Members of Parliament from Scheduled Areas
questions.option_4: Power to amend the Constitution regarding Schedule amendments

questions.question: Which of the following Articles of the Indian Constitution is commonly cited as forming the constitutional basis for Judicial Review?
What is the main feature of the 106ᵗʰ Constitutional Amendment Act, 2023?
questions.option_2: Reservation of one-third seats for women in legislatures
questions.option_3: Provision of legal status to Right to Property
